zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Bois於1356年8月29日出生在英國戴文哈爾波頓時，她的父親John de Bois I27歲，母親Eustace Sandeby27歲。她於大約1383年與Henry Burton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年5月15日在英國享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Bois于1356年8月29日出生在英国戴文哈爾波頓时，她的父亲John de Bois I27岁，母亲Eustace Sandeby27岁。她于大约1383年与Henry Burton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年5月15日在英国享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Dubois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Pierre, Fernand, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Michel, Alain, Luc.

French, Walloon, and English (of French Huguenot origin): topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ), or a habitational name for someone from any of several places in various parts of France and in Belgium (Wallonia) named Le Bois. This is the most frequent surname in Wallonia. It is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and Haiti. In both England and North America it is sometimes translated into English as Wood . Compare Deboe , Debois , Deboy , Duboise , and Dubose .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Du Bois) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the several Huguenot ancestors bearing this name was Chrétien Du Bois from Flanders, whose son, Louis Du Bois (born 1626 in Lille, France, died 1696 in Kingston, NY), was among the Huguenots who founded the town of New Paltz, NY 1675–78.

variants.name: Boisvert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Andre, Donat, Lucien, Jacques, Gaston, Normand, Pierre, Gilles, Herve, Adrien.
French:
topographic name for someone who lived in a dense forest or perhaps a copse of evergreens, from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + vert, verd ‘green’.

variants.name: Boisclair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Marcel, Aldege, Alphonse, Arsene, Edmour, Emile, Leopaul, Prudent, Rejean, Remi, Yves.

French: topographic name from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + clair ‘clear, light’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bois Clair, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Boies
meanings: Altered form of French   Bois  .

variants.name: Baskerville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Debois
meanings: Altered form of French   Dubois  , a cognate of 1 above.
French: topographic name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Bois was born on 29 August 1356, in Halberton, Devon, England, her father, John de Bois I, was 27 and her mother, Eustace Sandeby, was 27. She married Henry Burton about 1383. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 15 May 1420, in England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Bois est née le 29 août 1356, à Halberton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John de Bois I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eustace Sandeby, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Burton environ 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1420, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Bois am 29. August 1356 in Halberton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bois I 27 und ihre Mutter Eustace Sandeby 27. Sie hat um 1383 Henry Burton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1420 im Alter von 63 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Bois è nata il il 29 agosto 1356 nel Halberton, Devon, England, sua padre, John de Bois I, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Eustace Sandeby, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Henry Burton circa 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 maggio 1420, nel England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Boisが1356年8月29日にイギリスデボンハルバートンで生まれた時，父John de Bois Iは27歳，母Eustace Sandebyは27歳であった。約1383年にHenry Burtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年5月15日にイギリスで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Bois(이)가 1356년 8월 29일 영국 데폰 할버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bois I(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eustace Sandeby(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1383년 Henry Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 5월 15일 영국에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.29 August 1356–15 May 1420: 29 de agosto de 1356–15 de maio de 1420
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Bois nasceu em 29 de agosto de 1356, em Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bois I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eustace Sandeby, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Burton aproximadamente 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1420, em Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Bois родилась 29 августа 1356 г. в местности хэлбиртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Bois I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustace Sandeby, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Burton около 1383 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 мая 1420 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Henry Burton aproximadamente 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1420, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
